query: 最新两个季度规模增长最快的主动权益基金前10

args.sql: WITH latest_size AS (SELECT fund_code, fund_name, fund_company, asset_type, fund_size, date FROM fund_size WHERE asset_type = '主动权益' ORDER BY date DESC LIMIT 1), previous_size AS (SELECT fund_code, fund_size, date FROM fund_size WHERE asset_type = '主动权益' ORDER BY date DESC LIMIT 1 OFFSET 1), size_change AS (SELECT l.fund_code, l.fund_name, l.fund_company, l.asset_type, l.fund_size AS latest_size, p.fund_size AS previous_size, (l.fund_size - p.fund_size) AS size_diff FROM latest_size l LEFT JOIN previous_size p ON l.fund_code = p.fund_code), top_growth AS (SELECT fund_code, fund_name, fund_company, asset_type, latest_size, size_diff FROM size_change ORDER BY size_diff DESC LIMIT 10) SELECT fund_code AS "基金代码", fund_name AS "基金名称", fund_company AS "基金公司", asset_type AS "资产类型", latest_size AS "最新规模", size_diff AS "规模增长" FROM top_growth LIMIT 200

plan.rationale: 通过获取最新一期和前一期的基金规模，计算规模变化，筛选增长最快的前10只主动权益基金

notes: 未指定日期，使用 fund_size 最新数据
通过获取最新一期和前一期的基金规模，计算规模变化，筛选增长最快的前10只主动权益基金
SQL 由 LLM/规则生成，并经过只读白名单校验和 dry run。

metadata.sql: WITH latest_size AS (SELECT fund_code, fund_name, fund_company, asset_type, fund_size, date FROM fund_size WHERE asset_type = '主动权益' ORDER BY date DESC LIMIT 1), previous_size AS (SELECT fund_code, fund_size, date FROM fund_size WHERE asset_type = '主动权益' ORDER BY date DESC LIMIT 1 OFFSET 1), size_change AS (SELECT l.fund_code, l.fund_name, l.fund_company, l.asset_type, l.fund_size AS latest_size, p.fund_size AS previous_size, (l.fund_size - p.fund_size) AS size_diff FROM latest_size l LEFT JOIN previous_size p ON l.fund_code = p.fund_code), top_growth AS (SELECT fund_code, fund_name, fund_company, asset_type, latest_size, size_diff FROM size_change ORDER BY size_diff DESC LIMIT 10) SELECT fund_code AS "基金代码", fund_name AS "基金名称", fund_company AS "基金公司", asset_type AS "资产类型", latest_size AS "最新规模", size_diff AS "规模增长" FROM top_growth LIMIT 200

args.sql: WITH latest_fund_size AS (SELECT fund_code, fund_name, fund_company, asset_type, fund_size, date FROM fund_size WHERE asset_type = '主动权益' ORDER BY date DESC LIMIT 1), previous_fund_size AS (SELECT fund_code, fund_size, date FROM fund_size WHERE asset_type = '主动权益' ORDER BY date DESC LIMIT 1 OFFSET 1), size_growth AS (SELECT lfs.fund_code, lfs.fund_name, lfs.fund_company, lfs.asset_type, lfs.fund_size AS latest_size, pfs.fund_size AS previous_size, (lfs.fund_size - pfs.fund_size) AS growth, lfs.date AS latest_date FROM latest_fund_size lfs JOIN previous_fund_size pfs ON lfs.fund_code = pfs.fund_code), ranked_growth AS (SELECT fund_code, fund_name, fund_company, asset_type, latest_size, previous_size, growth, ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY growth DESC) AS rank FROM size_growth) SELECT fund_code AS "基金代码", fund_name AS "基金名称", fund_company AS "基金公司", asset_type AS "资产类型", ROUND(latest_size / 100000000, 2) AS "最新规模(亿)", ROUND(previous_size / 100000000, 2) AS "上期规模(亿)", ROUND(growth / 100000000, 2) AS "规模增长(亿)" FROM ranked_growth WHERE rank <= 10 LIMIT 200;

metadata.sql: WITH latest_fund_size AS (SELECT fund_code, fund_name, fund_company, asset_type, fund_size, date FROM fund_size WHERE asset_type = '主动权益' ORDER BY date DESC LIMIT 1), previous_fund_size AS (SELECT fund_code, fund_size, date FROM fund_size WHERE asset_type = '主动权益' ORDER BY date DESC LIMIT 1 OFFSET 1), size_growth AS (SELECT lfs.fund_code, lfs.fund_name, lfs.fund_company, lfs.asset_type, lfs.fund_size AS latest_size, pfs.fund_size AS previous_size, (lfs.fund_size - pfs.fund_size) AS growth, lfs.date AS latest_date FROM latest_fund_size lfs JOIN previous_fund_size pfs ON lfs.fund_code = pfs.fund_code), ranked_growth AS (SELECT fund_code, fund_name, fund_company, asset_type, latest_size, previous_size, growth, ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY growth DESC) AS rank FROM size_growth) SELECT fund_code AS "基金代码", fund_name AS "基金名称", fund_company AS "基金公司", asset_type AS "资产类型", ROUND(latest_size / 100000000, 2) AS "最新规模(亿)", ROUND(previous_size / 100000000, 2) AS "上期规模(亿)", ROUND(growth / 100000000, 2) AS "规模增长(亿)" FROM ranked_growth WHERE rank <= 10 LIMIT 200;

args.sql:
WITH latest_size AS (
  SELECT fund_code, fund_name, fund_company, asset_type, fund_size, date
  FROM fund_size
  WHERE asset_type = '主动权益'
  ORDER BY date DESC
  LIMIT 1
), previous_size AS (
  SELECT fund_code, fund_size, date
  FROM fund_size
  WHERE asset_type = '主动权益'
  AND date < (SELECT MAX(date) FROM fund_size WHERE asset_type = '主动权益')
  ORDER BY date DESC
  LIMIT 1
), size_change AS (
  SELECT l.fund_code, l.fund_name, l.fund_company, l.asset_type, l.fund_size AS latest_size, p.fund_size AS previous_size,
         (l.fund_size - p.fund_size) AS size_diff
  FROM latest_size l
  JOIN previous_size p ON l.fund_code = p.fund_code
)
SELECT fund_code AS "基金代码", fund_name AS "基金名称", fund_company AS "基金公司", asset_type AS "资产类型", latest_size AS "最新规模", previous_size AS "上期规模", size_diff AS "规模增长" 
FROM size_change
ORDER BY size_diff DESC
LIMIT 10;

), size_change AS (

)
SELECT fund_code AS "基金代码", fund_name AS "基金名称", fund_company AS "基金公司", asset_type AS "资产类型", latest_size AS "最新规模", previous_size AS "上期规模", size_diff AS "规模增长" 
FROM size_change
ORDER BY size_diff DESC
LIMIT 10;
